description: Machine-readable production blend config. Single source of truth; consumed by scripts/materialize_production_composite.py and run_v89_closed_loop.sh step 4.

blend.note: per trade_date pct-rank of each sleeve score, weighted sum; exact replica of ensemble_weight_search._ranked_sleeves

long_sleeve.reason: weight 0 chosen by ensemble_weight_search on validation 2024-08-28..2025-08-31; that selection is classified likely_overfit (PBO 0.886) and was never independently validated. Training the long sleeve is optional: QUANTAGENT_TRAIN_SLEEVES env in run_v89_closed_loop.sh.

trust.holdout_claim: the 38.6% CAGR (2025-09-01..2026-05-15) is contaminated_holdout — never cite as clean OOS

lineage.dataset_schema_note: plus7clean has no sibling schema json on disk (gap recorded in PRODUCTION_REPRODUCIBILITY_AUDIT.md Q5); per-sleeve feature schemas hashed below

training_env.QUANTAGENT_JUDGMENT_MAX_FACTORS: 64 (long sleeve feature cap; no-op for short/mid)
training_env.note: discovered during H-008 (2026-07-04): these env vars are REQUIRED to reproduce the production sleeve feature sets (long=90 features); they were previously undocumented lineage
